color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ctxmmu.Admit — the 'uninjectable context'
write-time admission gate (the flagship benchmark)

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SOUNDNESS ✓ (holds)
0 trigger-bytes leaked after quarantine
independently re-derived by a verify workflow

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
COMPLETENESS ✗ (fails)
42 obfuscated payloads → ≈100% ALLOWED
24/24 agent red-team + 16/18 canonical battery

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PRECISION ✗ (fails)
on our OWN context 4/4 quarantines were FALSE POSITIVES
it held mmu.go, ctxmmu_test.go, poison.json out of context
(the gate reading its own source)

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ROOT CAUSE: detection = regex (secrets) + ASCII substring (markers)
no NFKC normalize · no decode · no provenance · no semantics
→ a T1-class classifier: evadable + imprecise

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FIX (cheap, high-leverage): NFKC-normalize + strip zero-width before match ·
decode-and-rescan high-entropy blobs · gate quarantine on untrusted EGRESS,
not trusted local file reads. The architecture is sound; the DETECTION is the work.
